test-case.description: Should exist as a PowerShell script
test-case.name: Add-AppInsightsAnnotation.Script structure.Should exist as a PowerShell script

test-case.description: Should have a valid script block
test-case.name: Add-AppInsightsAnnotation.Script structure.Should have a valid script block

test-case.description: Should set ErrorActionPreference to Stop
test-case.name: Add-AppInsightsAnnotation.Script structure.Should set ErrorActionPreference to Stop

test-case.description: Should set StrictMode
test-case.name: Add-AppInsightsAnnotation.Script structure.Should set StrictMode

test-case.description: Should have a mandatory SubscriptionId parameter
test-case.name: Add-AppInsightsAnnotation.Parameters.Should have a mandatory SubscriptionId parameter

test-case.description: Should have a mandatory ResourceGroupName parameter
test-case.name: Add-AppInsightsAnnotation.Parameters.Should have a mandatory ResourceGroupName parameter

test-case.description: Should have a mandatory AppInsightsName parameter
test-case.name: Add-AppInsightsAnnotation.Parameters.Should have a mandatory AppInsightsName parameter

test-case.description: Should have a mandatory AnnotationId parameter
test-case.name: Add-AppInsightsAnnotation.Parameters.Should have a mandatory AnnotationId parameter

test-case.description: Should have a mandatory ReleaseName parameter
test-case.name: Add-AppInsightsAnnotation.Parameters.Should have a mandatory ReleaseName parameter

test-case.description: Should have a mandatory Commit parameter
test-case.name: Add-AppInsightsAnnotation.Parameters.Should have a mandatory Commit parameter

test-case.description: Should have a mandatory DeployedBy parameter
test-case.name: Add-AppInsightsAnnotation.Parameters.Should have a mandatory DeployedBy parameter

test-case.description: Should have a mandatory RunUrl parameter
test-case.name: Add-AppInsightsAnnotation.Parameters.Should have a mandatory RunUrl parameter

test-case.description: Should have an optional WorkspaceDirectory parameter with a default value
test-case.name: Add-AppInsightsAnnotation.Parameters.Should have an optional WorkspaceDirectory parameter with a default value

test-case.description: Should build the Azure management API URL with all required path components
test-case.name: Add-AppInsightsAnnotation.Implementation.Should build the Azure management API URL with all required path components

test-case.description: Should include Category field in the annotation body
test-case.name: Add-AppInsightsAnnotation.Implementation.Should include Category field in the annotation body

test-case.description: Should handle az rest failure via exit code check
test-case.name: Add-AppInsightsAnnotation.Implementation.Should handle az rest failure via exit code check

test-case.description: Should exist as a PowerShell script
test-case.name: Manage-EntraId.Script structure.Should exist as a PowerShell script

test-case.description: Should have a valid script block
test-case.name: Manage-EntraId.Script structure.Should have a valid script block

test-case.description: Should set ErrorActionPreference to Stop
test-case.name: Manage-EntraId.Script structure.Should set ErrorActionPreference to Stop

test-case.description: Should set StrictMode
test-case.name: Manage-EntraId.Script structure.Should set StrictMode

test-case.description: Should have a mandatory Environment parameter
test-case.name: Manage-EntraId.Parameters.Should have a mandatory Environment parameter

test-case.description: Should validate Environment to localhost, staging, and production
test-case.name: Manage-EntraId.Parameters.Should validate Environment to localhost, staging, and production

test-case.description: Should have an optional DisplayName parameter
test-case.name: Manage-EntraId.Parameters.Should have an optional DisplayName parameter

test-case.description: Should have a WebPort parameter defaulting to 5003
test-case.name: Manage-EntraId.Parameters.Should have a WebPort parameter defaulting to 5003

test-case.description: Should have a SecretExpiryDays parameter
test-case.name: Manage-EntraId.Parameters.Should have a SecretExpiryDays parameter

test-case.description: Should have a SkipUserAssignment switch parameter
test-case.name: Manage-EntraId.Parameters.Should have a SkipUserAssignment switch parameter

test-case.description: Should have a RemoveExpired switch parameter
test-case.name: Manage-EntraId.Parameters.Should have a RemoveExpired switch parameter

test-case.description: Should have a GitHubSecretName parameter defaulting to AZURE_AD_CLIENT_SECRET
test-case.name: Manage-EntraId.Parameters.Should have a GitHubSecretName parameter defaulting to AZURE_AD_CLIENT_SECRET

test-case.description: Should have an optional GitHubRepo parameter
test-case.name: Manage-EntraId.Parameters.Should have an optional GitHubRepo parameter

test-case.description: Should check for existing app registrations before creating
test-case.name: Manage-EntraId.Idempotent app registration.Should check for existing app registrations before creating

test-case.description: Should reuse existing app registration when found
test-case.name: Manage-EntraId.Idempotent app registration.Should reuse existing app registration when found

test-case.description: Should only create a new app registration when none exists
test-case.name: Manage-EntraId.Idempotent app registration.Should only create a new app registration when none exists

test-case.description: Should always use append mode for secrets (no invalidation)
test-case.name: Manage-EntraId.Secret management.Should always use append mode for secrets (no invalidation)

test-case.description: Should list existing credentials
test-case.name: Manage-EntraId.Secret management.Should list existing credentials

test-case.description: Should create secrets with a descriptive display name including date
test-case.name: Manage-EntraId.Secret management.Should create secrets with a descriptive display name including date

test-case.description: Should note that previous secrets remain valid
test-case.name: Manage-EntraId.Secret management.Should note that previous secrets remain valid

test-case.description: Should support removing only expired secrets
test-case.name: Manage-EntraId.Secret management.Should support removing only expired secrets

test-case.description: Should configure localhost redirect URI with port
test-case.name: Manage-EntraId.Redirect URIs per environment.Should configure localhost redirect URI with port

test-case.description: Should configure staging redirect URI
test-case.name: Manage-EntraId.Redirect URIs per environment.Should configure staging redirect URI

test-case.description: Should configure production redirect URIs for both domains
test-case.name: Manage-EntraId.Redirect URIs per environment.Should configure production redirect URIs for both domains

test-case.description: Should check Azure CLI authentication before proceeding
test-case.name: Manage-EntraId.Security requirements.Should check Azure CLI authentication before proceeding

test-case.description: Should check GitHub CLI for staging/production
test-case.name: Manage-EntraId.Security requirements.Should check GitHub CLI for staging/production

test-case.description: Should create service principal with assignment required
test-case.name: Manage-EntraId.Security requirements.Should create service principal with assignment required

test-case.description: Should use single-tenant audience
test-case.name: Manage-EntraId.Security requirements.Should use single-tenant audience

test-case.description: Should expose an Admin.Access API scope
test-case.name: Manage-EntraId.Security requirements.Should expose an Admin.Access API scope

test-case.description: Should clean up temporary files used for JSON payloads
test-case.name: Manage-EntraId.Security requirements.Should clean up temporary files used for JSON payloads

test-case.description: Should print secrets to console for localhost
test-case.name: Manage-EntraId.Secret delivery.Should print secrets to console for localhost

test-case.description: Should push secrets to GitHub for staging/production
test-case.name: Manage-EntraId.Secret delivery.Should push secrets to GitHub for staging/production

test-case.description: Should use environment-scoped GitHub secrets
test-case.name: Manage-EntraId.Secret delivery.Should use environment-scoped GitHub secrets

test-case.description: Should push the three GitHub secrets (TenantId, ClientId, ClientSecret)
test-case.name: Manage-EntraId.Secret delivery.Should push the three GitHub secrets (TenantId, ClientId, ClientSecret)

test-case.description: Should exist as a PowerShell script
test-case.name: Restore-Database.Script structure.Should exist as a PowerShell script

test-case.description: Should have a valid script block
test-case.name: Restore-Database.Script structure.Should have a valid script block

test-case.description: Should set ErrorActionPreference to Stop
test-case.name: Restore-Database.Script structure.Should set ErrorActionPreference to Stop

test-case.description: Should set StrictMode
test-case.name: Restore-Database.Script structure.Should set StrictMode

test-case.description: Should have a mandatory Target parameter
test-case.name: Restore-Database.Parameters.Should have a mandatory Target parameter

test-case.description: Should validate Target to local only (staging removed — permanent staging DB deleted)
test-case.name: Restore-Database.Parameters.Should validate Target to local only (staging removed — permanent staging DB deleted)

test-case.description: Should have an optional ProductionConnectionString parameter
test-case.name: Restore-Database.Parameters.Should have an optional ProductionConnectionString parameter

test-case.description: Should have an optional TargetConnectionString parameter
test-case.name: Restore-Database.Parameters.Should have an optional TargetConnectionString parameter

test-case.description: Should have a SkipDump switch parameter
test-case.name: Restore-Database.Parameters.Should have a SkipDump switch parameter

test-case.description: Should have a SkipRestore switch parameter
test-case.name: Restore-Database.Parameters.Should have a SkipRestore switch parameter

test-case.description: Should have a TablesOnly switch parameter
test-case.name: Restore-Database.Parameters.Should have a TablesOnly switch parameter

test-case.description: Should not reference psql-techhub-staging (permanent staging DB was deleted)
test-case.name: Restore-Database.Staging target removed.Should not reference psql-techhub-staging (permanent staging DB was deleted)

test-case.description: Should not reference ca-techhub-api-staging or ca-techhub-web-staging (permanent staging apps deleted)
test-case.name: Restore-Database.Staging target removed.Should not reference ca-techhub-api-staging or ca-techhub-web-staging (permanent staging apps deleted)

test-case.description: Should still drop and recreate database for local target
test-case.name: Restore-Database.Staging target removed.Should still drop and recreate database for local target

test-case.description: Should stop local docker compose services before restore
test-case.name: Restore-Database.Local restore behavior.Should stop local docker compose services before restore

test-case.description: Should reset local database password after restore
test-case.name: Restore-Database.Local restore behavior.Should reset local database password after restore

test-case.description: Should exist as a PowerShell script
test-case.name: Sync-KeyVaultSecrets.Script structure.Should exist as a PowerShell script

test-case.description: Should have a valid script block
test-case.name: Sync-KeyVaultSecrets.Script structure.Should have a valid script block

test-case.description: Should set ErrorActionPreference to Stop
test-case.name: Sync-KeyVaultSecrets.Script structure.Should set ErrorActionPreference to Stop

test-case.description: Should set StrictMode
test-case.name: Sync-KeyVaultSecrets.Script structure.Should set StrictMode

test-case.description: Should have a KeyVaultName parameter defaulting to kv-techhub-prod
test-case.name: Sync-KeyVaultSecrets.Parameters.Should have a KeyVaultName parameter defaulting to kv-techhub-prod

test-case.description: Should not have a PostgresHost parameter (connection string managed by Bicep)
test-case.name: Sync-KeyVaultSecrets.Parameters.Should not have a PostgresHost parameter (connection string managed by Bicep)

test-case.description: Should call Invoke-RestMethod to detect the current IP
test-case.name: Sync-KeyVaultSecrets.Key Vault firewall IP management.Should call Invoke-RestMethod to detect the current IP

test-case.description: Should reference checkip.amazonaws.com for IP detection
test-case.name: Sync-KeyVaultSecrets.Key Vault firewall IP management.Should reference checkip.amazonaws.com for IP detection

test-case.description: Should add the current IP to the Key Vault firewall before writing secrets
test-case.name: Sync-KeyVaultSecrets.Key Vault firewall IP management.Should add the current IP to the Key Vault firewall before writing secrets

test-case.description: Should use fallback IP providers if the primary one fails
test-case.name: Sync-KeyVaultSecrets.Key Vault firewall IP management.Should use fallback IP providers if the primary one fails

test-case.description: Should validate the IP response is a valid IPv4 address
test-case.name: Sync-KeyVaultSecrets.Key Vault firewall IP management.Should validate the IP response is a valid IPv4 address

test-case.description: Should remove the current IP from the Key Vault firewall in a finally block
test-case.name: Sync-KeyVaultSecrets.Key Vault firewall IP management.Should remove the current IP from the Key Vault firewall in a finally block

test-case.description: Should only remove the IP if it was added by this script
test-case.name: Sync-KeyVaultSecrets.Key Vault firewall IP management.Should only remove the IP if it was added by this script

test-case.description: Should not throw if IP removal fails in the finally block
test-case.name: Sync-KeyVaultSecrets.Key Vault firewall IP management.Should not throw if IP removal fails in the finally block

test-case.description: Should not write the database connection string secret (replaced by managed identity auth)
test-case.name: Sync-KeyVaultSecrets.Secret writing.Should not write the database connection string secret (replaced by managed identity auth)

test-case.description: Should not write the AI API key secret (replaced by Cognitive Services OpenAI User RBAC)
test-case.name: Sync-KeyVaultSecrets.Secret writing.Should not write the AI API key secret (replaced by Cognitive Services OpenAI User RBAC)

test-case.description: Should write the AAD client secret
test-case.name: Sync-KeyVaultSecrets.Secret writing.Should write the AAD client secret

test-case.description: Should use a temp file to write secret values (prevents exposure in process args)
test-case.name: Sync-KeyVaultSecrets.Secret writing.Should use a temp file to write secret values (prevents exposure in process args)
